product.name: ArGiyim Ic
product.categorySourceGroup: Front Side Polyester Back Side Cotton needle drop knit PolyCotton Fabrics
product.titleDescriptor: 50% Polyester 50% Cotton PolyCotton High Visible Needle Drop Knit Fabric
product.specLine: 180 g/m², 50% Polyester 50% Cotton High Visible, Needle Drop Knit Fabric
descriptions: 50% Polyester 50% Cotton PolyCotton high visible, needle drop knit fabric. The front side of the fabric is 100% Polyester which is ultra durable for work conditions and light, the back side of the fabric is cotton which provides breathability to the user.
ArGiyim İç is used for ultra durable t-shirts.
50% Polyester 50% Cotton PolyCotton High Visible Needle Drop Knit Fabric
180 g/m², 50% Polyester 50% Cotton High Visible, Needle Drop Knit Fabric
technicalParameters: Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
applicationImageLabels: Double face needle drop interlock high visible orange t-shirt

evidence: titleDescriptor: '50% Polyester 50% Cotton PolyCotton High Visible Needle Drop Knit Fabric'
applicationImageLabels: 'Double face needle drop interlock high visible orange t-shirt'
matches.rationale: Product is explicitly certified and marketed as a high-visibility fabric for hi-vis t-shirts, directly matching the hivis application.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Has antistatic (EN 1149) and arc protection (EN 61482) properties, but no explicit statement of use in electrical/energy sector work.
FR and chemical protection (EN 13034) properties present, but no explicit welding, foundry or metallurgy use stated.
FR performance (EN ISO 11612) is present, but the product is explicitly framed as hi-vis t-shirt fabric, not firefighter turnout gear.
